_metadata.task_description: Create loosefruit duplicate deletion feature - scan PR_LOOSEFRUIT table where DocID contains underscore (duplicate suffix pattern), delete from all locations, add to Python/PySide6 desktop app with proper layout following existing UI patterns

relevant_files.rationale: Contains DuplicateCleanup tab _build_duplicate_cleanup_tab() at line 1122 and DuplicateFetchWorker at line 619 - canonical PySide6 pattern for scan+delete table UI with QTableWidget, QGroupBox/QFormLayout, fetch-button+delete-button workflow, and QThread-based async worker with Signal/completed/failed pattern

key_code.description: Returns QWidget with QVBoxLayout containing two QGroupBox controls (duplicate DocID and Task Register sections), QTableWidget with 9 columns, fetch+delete button row with QCheckBox dry_run, QSpinBox period month/year, QComboBox category, QLineEdit filters - full pattern for scan/delete workflow
Qt QObject worker with Signal/list completed and Signal/str failed, async run() method calling client.get_duplicate_delete_targets() - canonical async fetch pattern used throughout the app
Button-connected slot methods that create worker in QThread, connect completed/failed signals, start thread - pattern for any scan workflow

relevant_files.topic_relation: Loosefruit duplicate deletion follows identical UI pattern: scan period/division/category to show QTableWidget results with dry_run checkbox and delete button. The PR_LOOSEFRUIT table scan adds a third groupbox section in _build_duplicate_cleanup_tab, parallel to existing duplicate DocID and Task Register sections.
